name: North American Alliance-Bus
districts_or_customers: Orchard Park / WNY area schools (presumed; not confirmed)
recent_news: No M&A or news located. Very small Orchard Park, NY entity at 18 Breezewood Dr; minimal web footprint. Orchard Park CSD's stated provider is Fisher Bus Service, not this firm.
fit_notes: Tiny ~35 employee WNY entity with no confirmable web presence; possibly micro-fleet or non-operating shell tied to a Radin-named broker. Low priority until existence and operating status verified.

name: K & H Busing
districts_or_customers: School District of Philadelphia area (per BBB / Manta listing as school bus transportation service)
recent_news: No M&A news. PA incorporation 2010 (as K&H Bus Service Inc). Multiple Philadelphia addresses associated (2329 E Hagert St; 2601 Wheatsheaf Ln). Active per BBB and Yelp as of 2026.
fit_notes: Small independent Philadelphia family-owned school bus contractor; Holzwarth family ownership suggests tuck-in possibility but scale is sub-30 employees — only useful as bolt-on to a larger PA Summit base.

name: NYC Schoolbus Inc
districts_or_customers: Presumed NYC DOE / OPT contractor; not confirmed on NYC DOE vendor list
recent_news: No M&A or news located. Note: distinct from NYC School Bus Umbrella Services (NYCSBUS, the city's non-profit operator). This Brooklyn micro-entity at 2252 E 59th Pl has essentially no online footprint.
fit_notes: Sub-scale Brooklyn entity, likely a single-route vendor or holdco; not a meaningful tuck-in candidate vs. larger NYC OPT contractors (Logan, Pioneer, Reliant, etc.). Skip unless deeper diligence confirms operating fleet.

name: BH Goodman Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Private schools, churches, ISDs, corporates in Greater Houston/Gulf Coast
recent_news: No M&A. Third-generation family-owned since 1969; 125+ buses/vans, 24/7 ops. PPP loan recipient. Headquartered 6001 N Shepherd Dr, Houston; Henry Rd location is a yard.
fit_notes: Attractive Houston tuck-in: 3rd-gen family ownership = strong succession signal, real ~125-vehicle fleet, diversified school/charter/church book. Revenue est in source list ($997K) materially understates true size — worth a direct approach as a Texas platform expansion candidate.

name: Marysville School Bus
districts_or_customers: Marysville Public Schools (MI) — sole/primary contracted provider
recent_news: No M&A. Long-running independent contractor (USDOT #351462, in operation since 1989) providing all student transportation for Marysville Public Schools. Satisfactory safety rating; ~19 drivers reported.
fit_notes: Classic single-district family operator (Marysville PS exclusive) with 35+ year history — high succession-likelihood, sticky contract. Small scale but a clean Michigan tuck-in if Summit has any nearby MI density.
